subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Hearken unto the call of the Wronged One. Verily, He remembereth thee and maketh mention of thee through the verses of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. O 'Attar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد اسمع ندآء المظلوم انه یذکرک و یذکرک بایات الله المهیمن القیوم یا عطار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
